title: Understanding [Your Project]

steps.title: What is [Your Project]?
steps.description: [Replace with: Brief explanation of what your project does, its core purpose, and key architectural approach. Example: 'An extensible text editor framework with immutable state for reliability. Uses EditorState snapshots and double-buffering updates.']

steps.title: The Core Engine
steps.description: [Replace with: Explain how your core system works, highlighting the main files. Example: 'Editor.ts manages the instance, State.ts holds immutable content, Updates.ts batches mutations, Reconciler.ts syncs to DOM.']

steps.title: Key Abstractions

steps.title: How to Extend
